metadata.title: HLShajara — Civic Documentation & Accountability
metadata.description: A civic platform preserving a documented record of crimes committed in Syria.

home.title: HLShajara
home.subtitleLine1: A peaceful, civic, popular documentation and accountability platform
home.subtitleLine2: targeting criminals of the Assad regimes first
home.subtitleLine3: then their enablers and all their social and economic arms
home.lead: The site is currently collecting data on affiliates or supporters of the Assad regime and its enablers, verifying and confirming it, and will soon publish detailed, indexed information publicly.
home.principlesLead: Six non-negotiable principles govern everything we do.
home.domainsLead: We receive and verify evidence from multiple trusted sources.
home.ctaText: You can send documented information with sources. Every submission passes an automated filter and dual human review.
home.slideAlt: Slide {n} from the Lestaka Shajara campaign

mission.title: Mission & Principles
mission.whatWeDoText: HLShajara is a civic documentation platform that seeks to preserve a publicly documented, source-backed record of crimes committed in Syria. We focus on named individuals and entities linked to specific acts, and refer these records to legal justice mechanisms.
mission.dont1: We do not target groups, sects, or identities.
mission.dont2: We do not publish any allegation without a documented source.
mission.dont3: We do not publish home addresses or location-tracking data.
mission.dont4: We do not allow any incitement or hate speech content.
mission.dont5: We do not publish names of children or uninvolved persons.
mission.codeOfConductText: Every contributor to the project is required to adhere to legal documentation standards, not disclose private information, and avoid sectarian or ethnic bias. Dual review is mandatory before any publication.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: A civic platform for documenting crimes committed in Syria. We focus on named individuals and entities linked to specific acts, without targeting any group, sect, or identity.
faq.q2: How do you ensure you don't target groups?
faq.a2: We do not collect or publish any data on sectarian, ethnic, or family identity. The data model structurally prevents any field that could be used for group targeting.
faq.q3: What is the accepted source standard?
faq.a3: Tier A sources: international investigation committees / courts. Tier B: recognized human rights organizations / sanctions lists. Tier C: confirmed investigative journalism.
faq.a4: Yes, via the public submission form. But every submission passes an automated filter (8 rejection rules) then dual human review before any publication.
faq.q5: What is the right of reply?
faq.a5: Any person listed in the record has the right to submit a statement or correction. We publish the statement alongside the entry with reply status noted.
faq.a6: Based on the Syrian Constitutional Declaration (March 13, 2025), Article 13 guarantees freedom of expression. This content expresses a political opinion.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.natureText: This website expresses a political opinion and documents allegations linked to named individuals and entities in the context of the Syrian conflict. Content is based on public, verifiable sources.
terms.allowedUseText: Content may be used for research, media, and legal purposes, provided the original source is cited. Content may not be used for incitement or to target individuals.
terms.disclaimerText: We make every effort to ensure accuracy, but we do not guarantee completeness or freedom from error. Users are responsible for independent verification.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataCollectedText: When sending information, we collect: the name of the reported entity, allegation description, sources, and your email (optional if you choose not to disclose). We do not collect full IP addresses — only an SHA-256 hash to prevent abuse.
privacy.howWeUseText: We use data for verification and review only. We do not sell or share submitter data with any third party. Data submitted anonymously cannot be linked to any identity.
privacy.cookiesText: We use only essential cookies for session management. We do not use third-party tracking tools.
privacy.yourRightsText: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us. However, we do not delete records related to review and audit as they are part of the accountability record.

record.title: Public Record
record.lead: The documented record of entities and individuals linked to specific crimes in Syria.

submit.title: Send Information
submit.lead: Send documented information about a named individual or entity. Every submission passes an automated filter and dual human review.
submit.introRule2: Reviewers will attach credible public sources later
submit.introRule3: No private, identity, or location data
submit.introGate: By continuing you confirm this report concerns documented conduct by a named actor — never a group, sect, or identity.

validation.invalidUrl: Link must start with http:// or https://
validation.invalidPhone: Contact number must contain only numbers.

submit.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please try again or use a different format.
submit.name: Your Name
submit.recaptchaError: reCAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
submit.restoreDraftBody: An unfinished report is saved on this device. You can resume it or start over.
submit.leaveWarning: Your report is not submitted yet. Leave this page and lose your progress?
submit.idName: Name of the individual or entity
submit.idRoleHint: Their official position or function — not a group, belief, or occupation.
submit.idPublicRefHint: Official website or registry page only — not a personal social profile.
submit.idPublicRefError: Personal social profiles are not accepted. Use an official website or registry page.
submit.idLocationError: Enter a governorate, city, or general area.
submit.idMismatchNotice: The role you entered does not match the selected actor type. Reviewers will check this.
submit.descHint: State the specific conduct, tied to the named actor. Minimum 20 characters.
submit.descWarnGroup: Remove identity- or group-based language. Document the named actor's specific conduct.
submit.descWarnPrivate: Remove private data — addresses, phone numbers, coordinates, or personal social links.
submit.descWarnInnocent: This appears to target a protected or non-combatant party. Document conduct, not status.
submit.descWarnIncitement: Remove any call to violence or retaliation. This is a documentation record.
submit.descWarnTone: Remove dehumanizing or hateful language. Keep a factual, legal register.
submit.leadNoteHint: For reviewers only. A note points us where to verify — it is never published and never counts as a source.
submit.mediaSafety: Supporting material only — never published as-is. Metadata is stripped on upload. Do not include faces of victims, children, or bystanders.
submit.mediaLink: Link to any videos or documents available on platforms for the same entity/person that support this report
submit.mediaLinkError: Personal social media links are not accepted. Use a public, archival source.
submit.dropzoneTitle: Drag files here or click to choose
submit.anonHelp: Contact details are used only for reviewer follow-up and are never published. Leave anonymity on if you prefer no contact.
submit.affirm: I affirm this concerns documented conduct by a named actor; reviewers will attach public sources during review.
submit.errAffirmGate: Check the box above to confirm before submitting.
submit.successBody: Thank you for contributing to the HLShajara campaign. Your report now enters review.
submit.err_private: Remove private, contact, or location details from the description.
submit.err_group: Remove identity-based or group targeting from the description.
submit.err_innocent: This appears to target a protected or non-combatant party. Revise the description.
submit.err_tone: Remove incitement or dehumanizing language from the description.
submit.err_mismatch: The entity type and the documented role appear mismatched. Revise the identity.
submit.locAtLeastOne: Please fill at least one of the following fields:
submit.locAddress: Address (area, neighborhood, street, village, or nearest landmark)
submit.locContactError: Contact number must contain only digits
submit.detailsOtherPersonHint: Write the person's name and position / role (max 256 characters)
submit.investorHint: You can add one or more investor names, or type 'Other' if the name is not available.
submit.hintReportCategory: Choose a report category to continue.
submit.hintEntityType: Choose an entity or person type to continue.
submit.hintEntityName: Enter the name / brand name to continue.
submit.hintLocationContact: Enter a phone number, email, website, or social account to continue.
submit.hintReportDetailsFlag: Select a party mentioned in the report to continue.
submit.hintReportDetailsFlagField: Complete the selected party's details to continue.
submit.hintReportDetailsReportedName: Enter the reported person's name to continue.
submit.hintReportDetailsCarPlate: Enter the car plate number to continue.
submit.hintAboutYouContact: Add at least one contact method to continue.
submit.hintExperience: Describe your experience (at least 20 characters) to continue.
submit.hintMediaEvidence: Add supporting media or notes if available.
submit.locMapsError: Personal social links are not accepted. Use a public Google Maps link.

submit.catTourismDesc: Hotels, restaurants, taxis, car rentals, chalets
submit.catMedicalDesc: Pharmacies, clinics, hospitals and medical centers
submit.catOrganizationsDesc: Civil society, media, unions, student clubs
submit.catRealEstateDesc: Houses, apartments, villas, farms, lands, shops and offices
submit.subCommercialBrandDesc: Report about a specific product or brand
submit.subCommercialFactory: Factory / workshop / e-shop / commercial store / mall

submit.subIndividualsStreetVendorDesc: Mobile vendor in markets or streets
submit.subIndividualsDriverDesc: Taxi, shipping, delivery or private driver
submit.subIndividualsShabbihaDesc: Shabbiha still serving the fallen regime today
submit.subIndividualsVolunteerDesc: National defense, army personnel, volunteer in the fallen regime's auxiliary forces
submit.subIndividualsCraftsmanDesc: Painter, electrician, plumber, blacksmith, carpenter, other
submit.subIndividualsOtherDesc: A person that does not match any other option
submit.subEducationalCourseDesc: Training course or specific educational program
submit.subTourismTravelCompanyDesc: Tourism, travel, Hajj or Umrah company
submit.subTourismPrivateCarDesc: Private car via app or office

legal.title: Legal Note
legal.note: Based on the review of the new Syrian Constitutional Declaration (March 13, 2025), Articles 7 and 10 bind the state, not individuals directly. Article 13 guarantees freedom of expression. This content expresses a political opinion.

policy.title: Anti-Discrimination Policy
policy.lead: HLShajara is committed to documenting crimes without targeting any group, sect, ethnicity, or identity.
policy.principle1Text: We do not collect, process, or publish data based on sectarian, ethnic, religious, or family identity. Our data model structurally excludes any field that could enable group-level targeting.
policy.principle2Text: Every entry in our record refers to a named individual or specific entity linked to documented acts. We do not associate persons with groups they may belong to.
policy.principle3Text: We reject submissions that profile persons by origin, belief, or affiliation. Our automated filters and human reviewers enforce this boundary at intake and publication.
policy.principle4Text: Victims and witnesses are documented by the acts committed against them, not by identity. Perpetrators are documented by the acts they committed, not by origin.
policy.enforcementText: Violations of this policy result in automatic rejection at intake or immediate unpublishing if discovered post-publication. Staff are trained and bound by this policy. Reports of violations can be submitted via the Right of Reply form.
